'''fagumu''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:zabra|zabra]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-g-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:zabra|zabra]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| fagumu
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:fægimith|fægimith]] || [[word:fægimij|fægimij]] || [[word:fægimish|fægimish]] || [[word:fægimi|fægimi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:fagugumuth|fagugumuth]] || [[word:fagugumuj|fagugumuj]] || [[word:fagugumush|fagugumush]] || [[word:fagugumu|fagugumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:fagumuth|fagumuth]] || [[word:fagumuj|fagumuj]] || [[word:fagumush|fagumush]] || [[word:fagumu|fagumu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:fagufmuth|fagufmuth]] || [[word:fagufmuj|fagufmuj]] || [[word:fagufmush|fagufmush]] || [[word:fagufmuf|fagufmuf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:fagumuthu|fagumuthu]] || [[word:fagumuju|fagumuju]] || [[word:fagumushu|fagumushu]] || [[word:fagumuku|fagumuku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:fagumuth|fagumuth]] || [[word:fagumuj|fagumuj]] || [[word:fagumush|fagumush]] || [[word:fagumu|fagumu]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:fagumuthul|fagumuthul]] || [[word:fagumujul|fagumujul]] || [[word:fagumushul|fagumushul]] || [[word:fagumukul|fagumukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:fagumuthuthu|fagumuthuthu]] || [[word:fagumujuju|fagumujuju]] || [[word:fagumushushu|fagumushushu]] || [[word:fagumuku|fagumuku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:fagumuthun|fagumuthun]] || [[word:fagumujun|fagumujun]] || [[word:fagumushun|fagumushun]] || [[word:fagumukun|fagumukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:fagumuthuoro|fagumuthuoro]] || [[word:fagumujuoro|fagumujuoro]] || [[word:fagumushuoro|fagumushuoro]] || [[word:fagumukuoro|fagumukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|1f1e26d}}
